hero_headline: Briar Cottage — A Cosy Stone Retreat in the Cotswolds

highlights.text: Perfect for couples: sleeps up to 2 guests in 1 bedroom.
Curl up beside a real fireplace in this charming stone cottage.
Stay connected with broadband internet throughout your stay.
Located in Stow-on-the-Wold, United Kingdom — a peaceful countryside setting.

about_section: Briar Cottage is a quiet, cosy stone cottage designed for two, nestled in the Cotswolds countryside. With 1 bedroom and 1 bathroom, it offers an intimate and comfortable escape. Check in from 4 PM and check out by 10 AM, giving you plenty of time to enjoy the tranquillity of the area.

amenity_descriptions.text: A fireplace provides a warm and inviting focal point, ideal for relaxing evenings in the cottage.
Broadband internet keeps you connected whenever you need it during your stay.
